news.title: TED, ETS and Khan launch new $10k AI degree
news.summary_en: ETS, TED and the Khan Academy have jointly launched a new AI degree model at a fraction of traditional college costs, vowing to create a globally accessible education pathway backed by global corporate giants.
news.author: Polly Nash

news.title: Europe looks beyond the region in global student recruitment push
news.summary_en: European countries are increasingly looking beyond their borders to recruit international students, signalling a shift in higher education strategy towards global competition, a report by the European Association for International Education (EAIE) has found.
news.author: Beth Kennedy

news.title: Nearly half of South Asian applicants refused Australian study visas
news.summary_en: Nepal and India hardest hit as Australia’s January-March visa data shows tightening, with the sector flagging a lack of clarity amid more stable outcomes for applicants from China and Southeast Asia
news.author: Abhishek Nair
